# ACCEPTED

**Enumeration Case**

The participant accepted the invitation.

## Declaration

```swift
const String ACCEPTED;
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **PENDING**: The participant was invited but hasn’t accepted.
- **UNKNOWN**: The status is unknown.

items.description: The participant was invited but hasn’t accepted.
